name: NOVATEK Reg.Shs (GDRs Reg.S)/10
summary: NOVATEK is one of the largest independent natural gas producers in Russia, engaged in the exploration, production, processing, and marketing of natural gas and liquid hydrocarbons. The company focuses on developing gas and gas condensate fields in the Yamal Peninsula. Novatek is headquartered in Tarko-Sale, Russia.
